repositories.name: .github
repositories.description: Default community health files, reusable workflows, and best-practices docs inherited by every FlexNetOS repo.

repositories.name: atc
repositories.description: ATC — Air Traffic Control: Open-Source Agent Orchestration

repositories.name: cellm
repositories.description: Mobile-native LLM serving engine research in Rust. Paged KV cache, multi-session scheduling, and Metal/Vulkan kernels for on-device inference under 512MB RAM.

repositories.name: claude-code
repositories.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

repositories.name: codex
repositories.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

repositories.name: cuda-oxide
repositories.description: cuda-oxide is an experimental Rust-to-CUDA compiler that lets you write (SIMT) GPU kernels in safe(ish), idiomatic Rust. It compiles standard Rust code directly to PTX — no DSLs, no foreign language bindings, just Rust.

repositories.name: ECC
repositories.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repositories.name: grit
repositories.description: Git for AI agents — zero merge conflicts, any number of parallel agents, same codebase

repositories.name: harness-agent-rs
repositories.description: Rust harness/agent-manager runtime — the execution layer for FlexNetOS harnesses, ported from Archon's design (harness_hub ADR-0001). Port-in-progress.

repositories.name: hermes-agent
repositories.description: The agent that grows with you

repositories.name: icm
repositories.description: Permanent memory for AI agents. Single binary, zero dependencies, MCP native.

repositories.name: inferrs
repositories.description: A TurboQuant inference server

repositories.name: kasetto
repositories.description: 📼 A declarative AI agent environment manager, written in Rust

repositories.name: lifeos
repositories.description: LifeOS desktop/cross-platform app

repositories.name: meta-ruvector
repositories.description: RuVector is a High Performance, Real-Time, Self-Learning Ai, Vector GNN, Memory DB built in Rust.

repositories.name: meta-yard
repositories.description: Yard: ported-from / reference / not-adopted-as-is source (Tier Y, META-ORG-POLICY P8.y). Out of the meta root build/CI.

repositories.name: meta_dashboard_cli
repositories.description: meta plugin: 'meta dashboard' — shells to 'envctl dashboard' to render the yazelix mission-control layout from .meta.yaml

repositories.name: n8n
repositories.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

repositories.name: network-control
repositories.description: Omada Network APP Software Controller, TRENDnet web Ui, ISP/ATT Modem

repositories.name: obscura
repositories.description: The headless browser for AI agents and web scraping

repositories.name: obsidian-mind
repositories.description: An Obsidian vault that gives AI coding agents persistent memory. Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI.

repositories.name: oh-my-claudecode
repositories.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

repositories.name: oh-my-pi
repositories.description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

repositories.name: rtk-tokenkill
repositories.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

repositories.name: ruflo
repositories.description: 🌊 The leading agent meta-harness for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

repositories.name: shimmy
repositories.description: ⚡ Pure-Rust WebGPU inference engine — OpenAI-API compatible, GGUF native, runs on any GPU. No Python. No llama.cpp. Single binary.

repositories.name: teri
repositories.description: Rust-native Swarm Intelligence Prediction Engine

repositories.name: vault_hub
repositories.description: shinny things and miracle wings

repositories.name: vox
repositories.description: A universal AI toolkit for high-performance Speech-to-Text (STT) and Text-to-Speech (TTS) processing, designed for low-latency and easy model integration.

repositories.name: yazelix
repositories.description: Yazi and Zellij with smart defaults & awesome plugins give helix/nvim a powerful yazi sidebar, git integrations, a configurable popup system (lazygit, a config ui, etc), zoxide integrations, zjstatus widgets, and more. Your terminal IDE.  Written in rust and blazingly fast. Available via flake/home-manager. One line install.
